---
title: "OECD Environmental Performance Reviews: Austria 2026"
date: 2026-05-22
author:
  - name: OECD
categories: 
  - OECD
Link: <a href='https://doi.org/10.1787/520533a1-en'>Link</a>
---

[Link to the publication](https://www.oecd.org/en/publications/oecd-environmental-performance-reviews-austria-2026_520533a1-en/full-report/towards-the-green-transition_3fc24d7a.html#title-a67cf265ec)
